title: salix tyrrhenica
intro: Salix tyrrhenica, also known as Tyrrhenian willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Salix tyrrhenica can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
